action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Piwowarczyk, Behnke, Dittrich, Duchow, Fitzgerald, Gundrum, Madison, Miresse, Murphy, O'Connor, Ortiz-Velez, Sinicki, Tittl and Wichgers; 
cosponsored by Senators Feyen, Hesselbein, Cabral-Guevara, Larson, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Tomczyk and Wirch
